checks.name: access_tier_oa
checks.summary: Every included paper's access.type is in the OA allowed set (v0 OA-only).  (11 included papers checked)

checks.name: strip_verbatim_similarity
checks.summary: OA papers exempt from caps (unlimited verbatim w/ attribution; >300-char spans → advisory WARN).  Non-OA: per-span text cap 300 chars, cumulative cap 1500 chars/DOI.  Near-verbatim similarity flagged for all.  (1412 verbatim spans scanned)

checks.name: pii_dual_use
checks.summary: Two-tier PII / dual-use scan of verbatim quote spans (pii_config=2026-06-15.1).  (1412 spans scanned)

checks.name: provenance_doi_license
checks.summary: Every skill carries a source DOI + a license SPDX tag.  (203 skills checked)
